title: Reference-Counting GC v2 Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for adding refcounting GC to Verb's heap allocations, implementing a separate design spec.
notes: Not a decision record, PRD, or standalone spec; it is a checklist-style implementation plan that executes an already-referenced design spec. Contains no 'Status: Accepted' or Context/Decision/Consequences structure (no ADR signal), no user stories/acceptance criteria (no PRD signal), and while it has technical detail it explicitly defers the authoritative contract to a separate SPEC file. Classified as DOC/plan; synthesizer may wish to treat the referenced design spec as the SPEC-type source instead.
